pages.text: $(novus)A Novus original.$() A field-list of every $(italic)Dynamic Trees$() seed in the pack — each leaf stays blank until you've held that seed, and a progress bar fills as you gather them all.$(br2)It doubles as a seed reference: every page also gives that seed's planting and its $(italic)catalyst → sapling$() recipe.$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + $(italic)any seed$(), shapeless.
pages.title: The Arborist's Journal
